name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations and same-day funding options.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating a network of physical store locations across the United States, including Colorado. The company has been serving consumers seeking quick access to cash and basic financial services for an extended period, maintaining a visible retail footprint with store locator services and customer support infrastructure. The company's primary service offerings center on emergency lending products designed for consumers who need rapid access to funds, supplemented by ancillary financial services to create a comprehensive offering for underbanked populations. ACE Cash Express advertises installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment processing, money transfers, tax preparation services, and business services across its store network. The company distinguishes itself through its physical store presence, allowing face-to-face transactions and same-day or next-day funding claims for qualified applicants. ACE maintains customer service infrastructure with dedicated phone lines for general inquiries and online loan operations, along with email support channels. The company operates with geographic variability—certain loan products are explicitly unavailable in specific states, and the website indicates service interruptions due to natural disasters (Hurricane Ida impacts noted). While ACE provides accessible lending for emergency situations, consumers should note that the specific terms, APR rates, and repayment structures are not disclosed on the provided website content, making it difficult to assess the true cost of borrowing relative to competitors or regulatory benchmarks.
address: 1701 Lincoln Hwy Ste C-6, North Versailles Township, PA 15137

company_info.headquarters: 1701 Lincoln Hwy Ste C-6, North Versailles Township, PA 15137

pros: Multiple service options available at physical store locations (installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Same-day or next-day funding claims for emergency cash needs
Dedicated customer service infrastructure with multiple contact methods (phone, email)
Online loan application option in addition to in-store services
Established retail network with store locator functionality
Services designed specifically for consumers needing quick cash access
Business services offerings expanding beyond consumer products
cons: Website contains non-functional pages and 404 errors, indicating potential technical maintenance issues
Geographic service limitations—specific loan products unavailable in certain states including some locations in Colorado
No APR, fees, or repayment term information disclosed on provided website content, preventing cost comparison
Store closure incidents due to natural disasters reported (Hurricane Ida), creating service disruption risk
Title loans and emergency small loans carry inherent higher-cost borrowing structures typical of the sector
best_for: Consumers in states where ACE operates who need $100-$1,000 in emergency cash within 24 hours
Individuals with vehicles seeking title-based loans with collateral available
Consumers seeking one-stop financial services including check cashing and bill payment alongside emergency loans
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is designed for consumers in emergency situations needing fast access to $100-$1,000 with the convenience of physical store locations and multiple service options. The primary caveat is that state-specific restrictions limit availability, and critical pricing information (APR, fees) is absent from their website, requiring direct contact before borrowing to understand actual costs.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
